name: Banners
description: Campaign banners, promo cards, and storefront placement rules.
author: Buyzilo

hooks.name: admin_dashboard.render_cards
hooks.description: Injects banner workload widgets into the admin control center.

hooks.name: storefront.homepage.render_blocks
hooks.description: Adds campaign banner blocks into the storefront homepage merchandising stack.

dataGovernance.retentionNote: Banner package owns homepage and storefront campaign configuration but should not remove shared storefront navigation settings.

screenshots.caption: Banner placements and campaign routing overview

adminPages.label: Banner Placements
adminPages.description: Campaign cards, landing pages, and placement rules
adminPages.title: Banners
adminPages.subtitle: Campaign landing pages, banner cards, and storefront messaging
adminPages.inactiveDescription: Activate the banners package before editing storefront campaign placements.

dashboardWidgets.title: Campaign placement desk
dashboardWidgets.subtitle: Open banner and campaign placement controls for storefront pages.

storefrontBlocks.title: Campaigns tuned by addons
storefrontBlocks.subtitle: Installed marketing packages can add homepage promotional blocks without hardcoded template edits.

prerequisites.label: Marketplace site name
prerequisites.description: Brand naming should be configured before publishing storefront banner campaigns.

tasks.label: Seed banner runtime flag
tasks.description: Marks banner runtime availability for package-governance checks.

tasks.label: Ensure banner runtime directory
tasks.description: Creates the addon runtime cache directory used by banner exports and previews.

migrations.description: Seed storefront banner visibility defaults for upgraded installs.

extensionMigrations.notes: Promote campaign-promos block as the primary homepage merchandising entry.

tasks.label: Clear banner runtime flag
tasks.description: Removes the package runtime marker when banners is uninstalled.
